recommendations.title: Bill Burr: Live at Red Rocks
recommendations.overview: Comedian Bill Burr sounds off on cancel culture, feminism, getting bad reviews from his wife and a life-changing epiphany during a fiery stand-up set.

recommendations.title: Black or White
recommendations.overview: A grieving widower is drawn into a custody battle over his granddaughter, whom he helped raise her entire life.

recommendations.title: Man About Town
recommendations.overview: A top Hollywood talent agent finds his cushy existence threatened when he discovers that his wife is cheating on him and that his journal has been swiped by a reporter out to bring him down.

recommendations.title: Bill Burr: Paper Tiger
recommendations.overview: Comedian Bill Burr talks male feminists, outrage culture, robot sex, and cultural appropriation in this standup comedy special shot in London.

recommendations.title: Blankman
recommendations.overview: Darryl is a childlike man with a genius for inventing various gadgets out of junk. When he stumbles on a method to make his clothes bulletproof, he decides to use his skills to be the lowest budgeted superhero of all.

recommendations.title: The Upside of Anger
recommendations.overview: After her husband runs off with his secretary, Terry Wolfmeyer is left to fend for herself -- and her four daughters. As she hits rock bottom, Terry finds a friend and drinking buddy in next-door neighbor Denny, a former baseball player. As the two g

recommendations.title: Mary and Max
recommendations.overview: A tale of friendship between two unlikely pen pals: Mary, a lonely, eight-year-old girl living in the suburbs of Melbourne, and Max, a forty-four-year old, severely obese man living in New York.

recommendations.title: Lion
recommendations.overview: A five-year-old Indian boy gets lost on the streets of Calcutta, thousands of kilometers from home. He survives many challenges before being adopted by a couple in Australia; 25 years later, he sets out to find his lost family.

recommendations.title: Handsome Devil
recommendations.overview: A music-mad 16-year-old outcast at a rugby-mad boarding school forms an unlikely friendship with his dashing new roommate.

recommendations.title: Miraculous World: New York, United HeroeZ
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, TV Movie, Action, Adventure
recommendations.overview: Marinette’s class is headed to New York, the city of superheroes, for French-American Friendship Week.
